events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: DTI squirter washers not fully crushed. This means the bolts haven't been properly tensioned. Per RCSC, fasteners must be properly tensioned. Squirter washers (DTI - Direct Tension Indicators) are designed to squirt material when proper tension is reached. If not fully crushed, the required tension hasn't been achieved. This is non-compliant.

"rationale": "DTI squirter washers are a tension-verification device; if not fully crushed, the required pretension has not been reached. RCSC requires that pretensioned and slip-critical joints achieve the specified minimum bolt tension, so the work is non-compliant and must be reworked.",
